nasb.text: When you go to war in your land against the adversary who attacks you, then you shall sound an alarm with the trumpets, that you may be remembered before the Lord your God, and be saved from your enemies.

esv.text: And when you go to war in your land against the adversary who oppresses you, then you shall sound an alarm with the trumpets, that you may be remembered before the Lord your God, and you shall be saved from your enemies.

cnv.text: 你們在本地與欺壓你們的仇敵作戰的時候，就要吹大聲，使你們在耶和華你們的　神面前得蒙記念，也得拯救脫離你們的仇敵。

ccb.text: 当你们在自己的土地上跟敌人作战时，要吹号，你们的上帝耶和华必眷顾你们，救你们脱离敌人。
